question: Looking at the US median income map, which statement below is the most accurate?

options.A: The median income gap between Tennessee and Georgia might exceed that between Georgia and Florida.
options.B: Tennessee and Georgia have similar median incomes.
options.C: Florida has the highest median income among the highlighted states.
options.D: The median income differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.

explanation: Indiana (45.9$k) and Delaware (49.7$k) have a 3.8$k median income difference, while Iowa (24.7$k) and North Carolina (25.1$k) have only a 0.4$k difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Indiana and Delaware into the same color bin (45-55$k range), making their large difference appear similar, while Iowa and North Carolina appear more different due to different color bins.
